calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Asset
Off Calendar Oct-14-2024 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine Existence Of Trust
Off Calendar Jul-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Worth appeared by zoom for Elia Pochron.

The court noted that there are no other appearances, stated that its inkling is that the signed copy of the trust (instrument number 2) that was in the binder is the trust to follow and asked Mr. Worth if Scott Wilson provided him with a word version of the trust. Mr. Worth stated that Mr. Wilson has gone radio silent and that he agrees that trust #2 is likely what the trustor wanted. The Petition to Determine Existence of Trust is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Tan. Not reported.
